# Internal Notes

These notes are not linked from any HTML page; they're reachable only
through the crawler's directory walk. They exist to exercise the
text-via-directory-walk path in Feature 0001.

## Topics covered

- Migration playbook for the upcoming v3 endpoint surface.
- Pager rotation notes for the on-call rota.
- A reminder to rotate the staging API keys quarterly.
